commit.subject: LU-13814 osc: remove otp_to
commit.message:
LU-13814 osc: remove otp_to

otp_to is duplicated by otp_count and can be removed.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
